overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a walk from the Muscle Sands gym area along the Vespucci Beach promenade, through palm tree plazas, past graffiti art walls, and onto the sandy beach with the Del Perro Pier visible in the distance. Bright sunny day with clear blue skies and vibrant colors.

events.description: turns left away from the blue building toward the palm tree lined walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along the promenade past pedestrians and turning left toward the palm tree lined path

notable_agents.action: man in red shirt walking across the promenade from right to left

entered.detail: distinctive turquoise building with multiple arches and Muscle Sands signage
tall palm trees lining the beachfront boulevard
wide concrete walking surface with expansion joints and crosswalk markings

segments.scene_description: The clip opens at the iconic blue Muscle Sands building on the beachfront promenade. The camera walks forward past scattered pedestrians, then turns left toward a palm tree lined walkway. The turquoise building dominates the initial view before giving way to grassy areas and palm trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: palm tree plaza with grassy mounds and concrete features

events.description: enters open plaza area with curved concrete benches and skate features

agents.ego_description: strolling along the palm-lined walkway passing grassy landscaped mounds and concrete plaza structures

entered.detail: curved concrete seating structures and skate ramps arranged in the plaza
landscaped grass hills with scattered palm trees between walkway and beach
distant downtown skyscrapers visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Moving through a wide open plaza area with landscaped grassy mounds and distinctive curved concrete benches. The palm trees now line the right side of the path, and the distant city skyline becomes visible. The concrete promenade continues through this recreational space.

scene_state.functional_zone: graffiti art corridor with painted walls and palm trees

events.description: enters graffiti-covered wall area with colorful street art
exits graffiti walls onto open sandy beach area

agents.ego_description: walking through the graffiti art area examining the colorful murals painted on walls and palm tree trunks

entered.detail: large abstract angular metal structure with rust texture and circular cutouts
concrete walls covered in vibrant colorful street art and murals
palm tree trunks painted with graffiti art and tags

segments.scene_description: Passing a massive rusted metal sculpture on the left, the scene transitions into a corridor of graffiti-covered walls. The ground becomes sandy, and palm trees with painted trunks line the path. Colorful street art covers every surface before opening up to the beach.

scene_state.functional_zone: open beach with umbrellas, lifeguard towers, and pier view

events.description: approaches crowded beach area with colorful umbrellas and sunbathers

agents.ego_description: walking across the sandy beach toward the ocean, passing sunbathers and colorful umbrellas with the pier in view

notable_agents.action: woman sunbathing on a towel on the sand

entered.detail: rainbow-colored beach umbrellas providing shade for sunbathers
white lifeguard station with red roof and American flag
long wooden pier extending into the ocean with amusement park structures
blue ocean water meeting the horizon
colorful inflatable rings and beach toys scattered on the sand

segments.scene_description: The scene opens onto the wide sandy beach with colorful umbrellas dotting the landscape. A white lifeguard tower stands prominently while the wooden Del Perro Pier extends into the ocean ahead. Beachgoers relax on the sand, and inflatable toys are scattered about as the camera approaches the water's edge with distant mountains visible behind the pier.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the urban beachfront promenade into the wide, sun-drenched expanse of a sandy beach. It begins at the turquoise Muscle Sands building, moving past pedestrians before turning left toward a walkway lined with palm trees and grassy areas. As the camera progresses, the scene opens into a wide plaza featuring curved concrete benches and landscaped mounds, with the city skyline emerging in the distance. The path then shifts into a vibrant corridor of graffiti-covered walls and painted palm trunks, passing a massive rusted sculpture before the urban environment gives way to the shore. Finally, the view expands onto the open sand dotted with colorful umbrellas and a white lifeguard tower, moving toward the wooden Del Perro Pier and the distant mountains under a clear blue sky.
